result.stdout:
usage: secretsmanager	<command> [<args>]

Commands:
	keyvault | kv          Download or upload secrets from/to Azure Key Vault
	variablegroup | vg     Download or upload secrets from/to Azure DevOps Variable Group

commands.payload:
usage: secretsmanager	<command> [<args>]

Commands:
	keyvault | kv          Download or upload secrets from/to Azure Key Vault
	variablegroup | vg     Download or upload secrets from/to Azure DevOps Variable Group
